description: The agent can invoke any function by name with no registry or permission check, so it reaches side-effecting tools freely.
body: Failure mode: dispatch looks up a tool by the model-provided name and calls it without a registry entry or permission gate, so a write, delete, or external tool runs on model whim. Detection signals: dispatch accepts arbitrary names; side-effecting tools have no permission flag; no deny-by-default; no test for an unregistered or unpermitted call. Do not expose an open function dispatch to the model. Safer fallback: register every tool with its side-effect class and required permission, deny unregistered names, gate side-effecting tools behind explicit grants, and add denial tests.
